steps.title: Match road to faraway place
steps.content: The claim says Dixie Pike has a deep connection to a distant place. The best quotation must name the road and show that its origin or meaning reaches beyond rural Georgia.

steps.title: Reject local or unrelated scenes
steps.content: A describes soil reaching Washington, DC but does not mention Dixie Pike, B shows people walking on the Pike locally, and D describes a wagon crossing tracks. The quotation linking Dixie Pike to Africa directly fits the claim. The answer is C.
